must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Nao Kirisame/桐雨 直 様, CPO)
Board Memo extract (2026-07-30): approval to enter Share Purchase Agreement (definitive) to acquire 62.5% of Shizuku Tech KK for ¥12,500,000,000; settlement mechanics and escrow at 8.0% agreed, subject to customary CPs
MAC/MAE clause (negated): execution of this DPA and the SPA shall not, in itself, constitute a Material Adverse Change; no MAE has occurred as of signing, carve-outs include general market conditions and epidemic events
FIEA note: the above constitutes 未公表の重要事実 until embargo; tender-offer timing and board recommendation are undisclosed and will be posted via TDnet upon embargo expiry and JFSA notification
Term sheet & deal checklist cross-ref: TS §3.4 KPIs; IR draft Q&A v2 notes no earnings forecast revision prior to 2026-09-15; research note cites only sector averages and does not include non-public performance metrics
Retention: employment records retained per tax law up to 7 years; 個人番号 is deleted promptly after purpose completion and in any case within 2 years of offboarding; access logs kept 2 years; backups overwrite on a 30-day rolling basis
Cross-border transfer: limited to CloudLattice Pte. Ltd. (SG) for encrypted eDiscovery; prior notice and consent obtained under APPI Art. 28; safeguards include encryption-at-rest, SCC-equivalent clauses, and PPC-referenced safeguards
Security controls: role-based access, vaulting of 個人番号 with split-key HSM, quarterly audits; identifiers masked in analytics (e.g., Employee ID E-9X4*73 and Vendor Code VND-0O1l)
Public-source carve-out: according to Shizuku Tech’s 2024-02-01 website press archive and a 2025-12-20 Nikkei sector piece (public), industry R&D spend averages were used in our research note; no non-public revenue data is included
Lowercase project note: todo — align dsar template with jp-language form, finish sop v1.1, and book team spa day after close; also ping ir for the q3 placeholder page
Contact for board secretariat: Mr. Keita Moroi (守井 慶太 様), Board Sec., keita.moroi@hoshinova.co.jp
